Name: PLAYER_CAMOUFLAGE_PATTERN_PARAM_ST
Description:
Defines the Pattern options for Armored Cores.

Row ID links the Preset to the icon texture in SB_Camouflage.dds and SB_Camouflage.layout

Row ID + 210701 links the Preset to the FMG name it uses in the menu.

Fields.Name: Pattern Scale: Small Part
Fields.Description: The UV scale to use with the pattern texture when applied to 'Small' parts.

Fields.Name: Pattern Scale: Large Part
Fields.Description: The UV scale to use with the pattern texture when applied to 'Large' parts.
